title: Paw Patrol Chase Plastic Bottle with Straw BPA Free 580 ml School Water Bottle for Girls 100% Leakproof Durable Drink Bottle for Kids
features: Paw Patrols Plastic Water Bottle with Straw: Perfect for school or nursery, this high-quality bottle features iconic Paw Patrols graphics, suitable for boys and girls.
BPA-Free and Easy to Clean: Ensure safe hydration with this BPA-free water bottle, perfect for school children's daily use. Our Bottle is designed for easy clean and durability.

Suitable for Boys and Girls: Versatile design suitable for both boys and girls, offering a stylish and functional option for all young Paw Patrol fans. See our store page for all Official Paw Patrol Merchandise

580ml Capacity: Ample capacity for keeping kids hydrated throughout the school day, ideal for boys and girls. Equipped with a leakproof straw, making it perfect for school children's use during class or on the go. Made of Durable material make it last much longer than other bottles

Complete Set: Elevate your child's gear with the full set, including a matching Lunch Bag and Drawstring bag which you can buy seperately in our store. Together, they create a coordinated look for on-the-go adventures, ensuring your child is equipped with everything they need
